overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a white spacesuit with a red backpack exploring a frontier settlement. The character walks through narrow stone passages into an open market area with makeshift stalls, crosses a dusty plaza, and approaches a building labeled 'GALBANK'.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor leading to market

events.description: exits narrow stone corridor into open market area

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs and emerging from a narrow passage into a sunlit market

entered.detail: rough stone wall forming the narrow passage
silver metal handrail along the stairs
large cylindrical metal tank visible in the distance
makeshift wooden stall with tarp covering

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow stone corridor with metal railings, walking up stairs before emerging around the 3-second mark into a sunlit market area with makeshift stalls and industrial structures visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market area, passing various vendor stalls and tables

notable_agents.action: standing near a stall, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: wooden stall with beige canvas canopy
rustic wooden display table with items on it
patchwork metal and wood structure with corrugated roof

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bustling market area with makeshift stalls and wooden tables under a clear sky. Various NPCs are browsing goods, and industrial structures line the path as the character moves deeper into the settlement.

events.description: passes by an NPC walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: crossing an open dusty plaza toward a large industrial building in the distance

notable_agents.action: armed guard walking past the character toward the market area

entered.detail: large industrial building with stairs leading to entrance
low wooden fence blocking off an area
concrete steps leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an open plaza with sparse pedestrian activity, passing an armed NPC walking in the opposite direction. The GALBANK building becomes the focal point ahead, with its entrance stairs and industrial facade growing larger as the character approaches.

events.description: enters the shadow of the building, lighting becomes significantly darker
approaches the covered entrance threshold of the GALBANK building

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs toward the GALBANK entrance, preparing to enter the building

entered.detail: illuminated sign with 'GALBANK' text above the entrance
metal doorway with frame leading into the building
rectangular light fixtures mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the concrete stairs toward the GALBANK building entrance, moving from bright sunlight into shadow around the 42-second mark. The illuminated GALBANK sign becomes visible above the doorway as the character approaches the threshold, with wall lights flanking the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone corridor into a sprawling frontier settlement that culminates at the entrance of a corporate building. It begins by ascending stairs within a narrow stone passage lined with metal railings before emerging into a bright, sunlit market filled with makeshift stalls and industrial structures. As the character moves deeper into the settlement, the scene expands from the bustling market into an open, dusty plaza where the camera passes a patrolling armed guard. The focus then shifts toward the imposing facade of the GALBANK building, which grows larger in the frame as the character crosses the open space. Finally, the camera ascends concrete stairs, transitioning from the brilliant daylight into the cool shadow of the building's threshold beneath an illuminated sign and flanking wall lights.
